title: mentha × carinthiaca var. subtomentosa
intro: Mentha × carinthiaca var. subtomentosa, commonly known as mint, is a hybrid species of mint that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha × carinthiaca var. subtomentosa include reducing nausea and vomiting, alleviating menstrual cramps, and improving digestion, as well as providing a natural breath freshener. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or added to food and drinks, and it is also used in aromatherapy and skincare products for its refreshing and soothing properties.
